title: Vite proxy ECONNREFUSED on every startup
why: Node.js >=17 changed DNS resolution to prefer IPv6 (::1) before IPv4 (127.0.0.1). The Express backend binds to 0.0.0.0 (IPv4 only). Vite boots in ~370ms but backend takes 3-5s to initialize Firebase. When Vite proxy resolves 'localhost' → '::1' and fires a Socket.IO request before backend is ready, the connection is refused because nothing is listening on ::1.
root_cause: Node.js >=17 DNS prefers IPv6; backend is IPv4-only; Vite boots faster than backend.
solution: Changed all Vite proxy targets from http://localhost:5000 to http://127.0.0.1:5000 (explicit IPv4). Added proxy.on('error') handler suppressing ECONNREFUSED during startup race window.
prevention: Never use 'localhost' as a proxy target in Node.js >=17 environments. Always use explicit '127.0.0.1' for IPv4 or '::1' for IPv6.
